title: schkuhria pinnata var. guatemalensis
intro: Schkuhria pinnata var. guatemalensis, also known as Guatemalan Yerba Santa, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant actions, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and infections. The plant's health benefits include relieving coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Schkuhria pinnata var. guatemalensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
